ticket.subject: Database connection pool exhausted - orders not processing since 13:45 UTC
ticket.body: Our order processing system has been unable to persist new orders for the past 15 minutes. The database connection pool is at maximum capacity and all new queries are timing out. Stripe charges are still going through but orders fail to save in our system, causing duplicate payment attempts from customers. We're currently losing ~$8k per minute in unrecorded revenue and customer support is being flooded with failed order complaints.
